PostToolUse.comment: Fires ONLY when the AI writes or edits a file after you approve/press Enter.

Stop.comment: When the AI finishes a session — notify team with change summary.

instructions: This is the ai-hooks-demo project: Spring Boot 3 + React 18.
Backend: backend/  |  Frontend: frontend/  |  Hooks: hooks/
After every approved file change the hooks automatically validate and report.
Never hardcode passwords, tokens, or API keys in source files.
Always write tests alongside new features.
Follow REST conventions: use nouns for endpoints, correct HTTP verbs.
Java style: constructor injection, no field injection, no Lombok unless agreed.
React style: functional components only, hooks for state, no class components.
